title: WES/WGS DeepVariant Pipeline Parameters
description: Schema for the WES/WGS DeepVariant pipeline parameters

input.help_text: A CSV file with columns: sample_id, fastq_1, fastq_2 (optional for paired-end)

outdir.help_text: Path to output directory for results

fasta.help_text: Path to reference genome FASTA file (must be indexed with .fai)

fasta_fai.help_text: Path to .fai index file (auto-generated if not provided)

target_bed.help_text: BED file with exome capture target regions (required for WES mode)

seq_type.help_text: Specify whether data is from whole-exome (wes) or whole-genome (wgs) sequencing

dv_model_type.help_text: Override automatic model selection. Auto-determined from seq_type if not specified

dv_version.help_text: Version of DeepVariant Docker image to use (e.g., 1.8.0)

dv_num_shards.description: Number of shards for DeepVariant parallelization
dv_num_shards.help_text: Number of parallel shards for make_examples stage (default: number of CPUs)

dv_gvcf.help_text: Generate genomic VCF output in addition to VCF

dv_extra_args.help_text: Extra arguments to pass to run_deepvariant

skip_fastqc.help_text: Skip FastQC step for raw and trimmed reads

skip_deepvariant.help_text: Skip DeepVariant step (useful for QC-only runs)

fastp_extra_args.help_text: Extra arguments to pass to fastp

adapter_preset.help_text: Use illumina to trim common Illumina adapters by default, or none to rely only on fastp auto-detection/custom settings

adapter_sequence.help_text: Adapter sequence passed to fastp --adapter_sequence. Overrides adapter_preset when set

adapter_sequence_r2.help_text: Adapter sequence passed to fastp --adapter_sequence_r2. Overrides adapter_preset when set

adapter_fasta.help_text: FASTA file with custom adapter sequences for trimming

bwa_mem2_sort_threads.description: Number of threads for BAM sorting
bwa_mem2_sort_threads.help_text: Number of threads for samtools sort after alignment

bwa_mem2_sort_memory.help_text: Memory allocated for samtools sort after alignment

publish_dir_mode.help_text: Mode for publishing output files to results directory

email.help_text: Email address to receive pipeline completion notifications

email_on_fail.help_text: Email address to receive pipeline failure notifications only

plaintext_email.help_text: Send plain text email instead of HTML
